## What's on your mind?

## Background
<!-- Optional: what led you to this question? What have you already looked at? -->

## What kind of response are you looking for?

- [ ] Theoretical / philosophical discussion
- [ ] Pointer to existing resources
- [ ] Collaboration on an experiment

> Not sure if your question fits? Open it anyway.
> There are no bad questions here — if you're confused, others probably are too.
